title: Free NBA Picks & Predictions - Today’s Best NBA Bets

picks.analysis: Wembanyama has fresh legs after two full days off and has to be everywhere in this do-or-die game for the Spurs, including all over the glass. He hauled in a series high 13 boards in Game 4, getting himself in position for 19 rebounding chances. San Antonio need to kept the 7-footer anchored to the paint on defense while needing him to attack inside on offense. I expect to see extra offensive rebounds from Wemby, who snatched five ORBs in Game 4. Projections range from 12 boards to 15+, with my forecast coming out at 13.7 rebounds. That should have the Over 11.5 touting vig as high as -170.

picks.selection: 3 LEG PARLAY Victor Wembanyama o28.5 Points Scored Points Scored Victor Wembanyama o11.5 Total Rebounds Total Rebounds +400
picks.analysis: I might be one of the rare ones that likes San Antonio to survive Game 5. The two-day break gives Wemby rest but also allows the young Spurs to put the Game 4 collapse behind them. New York’s comeback benefited from some lucky bounces, friendly rims, and self-inflicted wounds from San Antonio. Wembanyama gets aggressive from the opening tip, both attacking the rim and cleaning the glass. His models call for 29+ and as many as 15+ boards for Game 5.
